name: Fathom Analytics
description: Read Fathom Analytics (privacy-friendly web analytics) from any AI agent: aggregations, pageviews, events, sites, custom domains. 6 tools, Bearer auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the Fathom Analytics API v1 (usefathom.com/api).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://app.usefathom.com → top-right avatar → **Account → API Keys → Generate a new API key**.
2. Pick scopes: at minimum 'sites:read' + 'aggregations:read'.
3. Set `FATHOM_API_TOKEN`.

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${FATHOM_API_TOKEN}`.

**Aggregations API**: the most useful — flexible querying like Stripe Sigma. Pass `entity`, `entity_id`, `aggregates`, `date_grouping`, filters, etc. Returns rows of data.

**Common queries**:
  - Pageviews this week, by day: aggregates=`pageviews,visits,uniques` + date_from=`2025-01-01` + date_grouping=`day`
  - Top pages: aggregates=`pageviews,uniques` + field_grouping=`pathname` + sort_by=`pageviews:desc`
  - Top referrers: aggregates=`pageviews,uniques` + field_grouping=`referrer_hostname` + sort_by=`pageviews:desc`
  - Events conversion: entity=`event` + entity_id=YOUR_EVENT_ID + aggregates=`conversions,uniques,value`

**Rate limits**: 240 req/min per token. On 429 back off.

**Out of scope here**: site CRUD (Fathom limits this), event CRUD beyond list, account billing.

tools.name: fathom_current_user
tools.description: Return account info: id, name, email.

tools.name: fathom_list_sites
tools.description: List Fathom sites tracked. Each has id, name, sharing setting, created_at.

tools.name: fathom_list_events
tools.description: List events (conversion goals) for a site. Each has id, object, name, currency, target_conversion_value, etc.

tools.name: fathom_aggregations
tools.description: Run an aggregation query — Fathom's main analytics endpoint. See instructions for common query patterns.

entity_id.description: Site ID (for pageview) OR event ID.

aggregates.description: Comma-separated: pageviews, visits, uniques, avg_duration, bounce_rate, conversions, value, etc.

field_grouping.description: Group by field: pathname, referrer_hostname, country, browser, device_type, hostname, utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_term, utm_content.

tools.name: fathom_current_visitors
tools.description: Get the current number of visitors on a site (real-time).

detailed.description: If true, also return arrays of currently-viewed pathnames + countries.

tools.name: fathom_create_event
tools.description: Create a new event (conversion goal) for a site.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency for event value tracking.
